faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What types of photos work best?
faq.a1: Our AI works best with portrait photos, family photos, and landscape images. The higher the original resolution, the better the results.
faq.a2: Most photos are processed within 1-3 minutes. Complex restorations or animations may take slightly longer.
faq.a3: Yes. Your photos are processed securely and automatically deleted after 24 hours. We never share your data with third parties.
faq.q4: Can I use the results commercially?
faq.a4: Yes. You own full rights to the restored and animated versions of your photos.
